Package index

All functions

`[[`(<ea_data>) `[`(<ea_data>,<ANY>,<missing>,<missing>) `[`(<ea_data>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>)
Extract or Access Parts of an ea_data Object
`[[`(<ea_spatial>) `[`(<ea_spatial>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>)
Extract or Access Parts of an ea_spatial Object
amo
Atlantic MultiDecadal Oscillation (AMO) Index (ea_data)
ao
Arctic Oscillation (AO) Index (ea_data)
as_ea_data()
Coerce a data frame to an ea_data S4 object
as_ea_spatial()
Coerce a spatial object to an ea_spatial S4 object
azmp_bottom_temperature
AZMP Scotian Shelf Bottom Temperature (ea_data)
azmp_salinity
AZMP Surface Salinity (ea_data)
azmp_satellite_temperature
AZMP Scotian Shelf SST from Satellite (ea_data)
azmp_stratification
AZMP Scotian Shelf Stratification Index (ea_data)
azmp_surface_temperature
AZMP Scotian Shelf Surface Temperature (ea_data)
cite_marea()
Get citation information for marea
coastline
Coastline Data for North Atlantic Region
ea.print()
Print an ea_data or ea_spatial Object
ea.subset()
Filter an ea_data Object by Column and Value
ea.subset.spatial()
Filter an ea_spatial Object by Attribute
ea.summary()
Summary method for an ea_data or ea_spatial object
ea_data-class
An S4 Class for Environmental Assessment Data
ea_data()
Constructor for ea_data Objects
ea_spatial-class
An S4 Class for Spatio-Temporal Environmental Assessment Data
ea_spatial()
Constructor for ea_spatial Objects
azmp_salinity
ecological indicators (ea_data)
get_CMEMS_ncdf()
Download Copernicus Marine (CMEMS) data
get_erddap_data()
Download satellite ocean colour data
glorys_bottom_temperature
GLORYS Bottom Temperature (ea_spatial)
grey_seals grey_seals_2021
Estimated Grey Seal Abundance (ea_data)
marea_citation_reminder()
Print a reminder to cite marea
marea_metadata()
Get metadata for all datasets in marea
nao
North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) Index (ea_data)
npgo
North Pacific Gyre Oscillation (NPGO) Index (ea_data)
oni
Oceanic Niño Index (ONI)
pdo
Pacific Decadal Oscillation (PDO) Index (ea_data)
plot(<ea_data>,<missing>)
Plot an ea_data object with multiple styles
plot(<ea_spatial>,<missing>)
Plot an ea_spatial object with multiple styles
satellite_ocean_colour
Satellite Ocean Colour (ea_spatial)
soi
Southern Oscillation Index (SOI) (ea_data)

Developed by Jamie C. Tam, Benoit Casault, Stephanie Clay, Adam Cook, Remi Daigle, Andrew M. Edwards, Jaimie Harbin, Brad Hubley, Keith David, Mike McMahon, Emily A. O’Grady.
